'''Ren''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Givin/Legends|Givin]] who played a game of [[Sabacc/Legends|Sabacc]] against [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] on [[Onadax]] and lost.<ref name="NJO">''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]''</ref>
